codeReview.summary: Loop detection module implemented in swell-tools with comprehensive coverage of all four required loop patterns: SameToolRetry, Oscillation, ReplanningLoop, and NoProgressDoom. The implementation includes 14 unit tests covering all patterns, severity calculations, configuration, callbacks, and edge cases.

summary: Feature passes review. Implementation fully covers the expected behavior: same-tool retry detection, oscillation pattern detection, re-planning loop detection, and no-progress doom detection with intervention callbacks. All 14 tests pass. No code issues found. The implementation follows existing project conventions and Rust idioms.
